headline: Nvidia, Microsoft, and Arm are all teasing Nvidia’s new N1X laptop processors
summary: Nvidia is expected to announce new Arm-powered laptop chips at Computex. Microsoft, Nvidia, and Arm are openly teasing this 'new era of PC.' This highly anticipated reveal marks a significant step for Nvidia in the laptop market.

headline: SpaceX gets $4 billion contract to build missile-tracking ‘Golden Dome’ satellites
summary: SpaceX secured a $4.16 billion contract from the Pentagon. The deal is for building missile-tracking satellites for the 'Golden Dome' defense system. These satellites will enhance the US Space Force's ability to detect and track targets from space.

headline: Acer’s launching a Linux handheld for streaming your PC games
summary: Acer is launching the Nitro Blaze Link, a Linux-based handheld device. It's designed primarily for streaming PC games, akin to a PlayStation Portal. The device features a 7-inch display and will launch in Q4 2026.

headline: Tech companies desperately want to film you doing chores
summary: AI training startup Shift offers free home cleaning services in exchange for footage. The collected video footage is used to train robot house cleaners. The company plans to expand its service to London and other cities.

headline: IGN Live 2026: How to Watch and What to Expect
summary: IGN Live 2026 is a two-day gaming and entertainment event on June 6-7. The guide provides details on how to watch and what to expect. Fans can join in-person or stream the event from home.

headline: The New 2026 Apple iPad Air with M4 Chip Drops to a New All-Time Low Price in May
summary: The 2026 Apple iPad Air with the M4 chip is currently at a record low price. Shoppers can save $80 compared to purchasing from the Apple Store. This deal is available in May for the new model.

headline: This $1,800 Power Lift Recliner and Massage Chair Is Just $385 During the Wayfair Memorial Day Sale
summary: A power lift recliner and massage chair is heavily discounted at Wayfair. Originally $1,800, it's now available for just $385 during the Memorial Day Sale. This massive saving makes it an attractive offer for buyers.

headline: Exclusive Interview: How Music Shaped the World of Zenless Zone Zero
summary: An exclusive interview explores the music of HoYoverse's new IP, Zenless Zone Zero. Music Director Yang Wutao discusses Sān-Z Studio's soundtrack creation process. The discussion highlights the integral role of music in shaping the game's world.

headline: 'Poison seller' who sold toxic chemicals online to people across world admits aiding suicides
summary: Kenneth Law admitted to aiding suicides by selling toxic chemicals online. Charges relate to Canadian victims, but families seek UK charges over 79 deaths. The individual distributed chemicals to people across the globe.

headline: Nato and EU condemn Russia after drone hits Romanian residential block
summary: Nato and the EU have condemned Russia after a drone hit a Romanian residential block. Romania believes its air defenses hit the drone over Ukraine, altering its trajectory. The incident has drawn strong international criticism against Russia.

headline: Exploding rocket casts doubts over Nasa's Moon plans
summary: A Blue Origin rocket explosion creates a setback for the company. The incident also casts doubts on Nasa's ambitious Moon plans. The failure impacts future lunar missions and development.

headline: Child among three dead in tower block fall
summary: A man, a woman, and a child tragically died after a fall in a tower block. All three were pronounced dead at the scene in Elephant and Castle. The incident involves a devastating loss of life.
